name: syntaxlight
documentation:
# syntaxlight

> 本项目仍在开发中, 尚不可用...

syntaxlight 是一个基于 BNF 的语法高亮的 python 库, 您可以 [在线浏览](https://luzhixing12345.github.io/syntaxlight/articles/全部文法高亮/C/) 文法高亮结果

目前支持 C/Python 等主流编程语言和 json xml 等主流标记语言的文法解析, 支持多种高亮主题以及自定义颜色(默认使用 Vscode 风格), 您可在此查看[全部文法支持和高亮支持](https://luzhixing12345.github.io/syntaxlight/articles/%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E6%89%8B%E5%86%8C/%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E6%96%87%E6%B3%95%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81/)

## 安装

```bash
pip install syntaxlight
```

## 快速开始

syntaxlight 提供了一个简易的 API 用于预览结果: `syntaxlight.example_display`

```python
import syntaxlight

syntaxlight.example_display('./1.c')

# syntaxlight.example_display('./your-code.c', style='one-dark-pro')
```

运行可以得到 `syntaxlight_example/` 文件夹, 使用浏览器打开其中的 index.html 即可预览. 同时会生成解析得到的抽象语法树 ast.dot, Vscode 用户可以下载 [graphviz-interactive-preview](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=tintinweb.graphviz-interactive-preview) 插件预览, 或者安装 [graphviz](https://graphviz.org/) 之后使用下面的命令导出 png

```bash
dot -Tpng ./ast.dot -o ast.png
```

## 文档和 API

关于详细的 API 使用方法, 以及对于默认配置的修改情况请参阅 [syntaxlight 使用文档](https://luzhixing12345.github.io/syntaxlight/)

## 开发功能

本仓库的 Makefile 与 test.py 提供了对于测试用例的渲染预览, 运行后打开 syntaxlight_example/index.html 即可

```bash
# 浏览所有 C 测试用例集合渲染结果
make 

# 浏览所有 json 测试用例集合渲染结果
make t=json

# 浏览 json 第一个 test/json/1.json 测试用例渲染结果
make t=json i=1

# 浏览 toml 第一个 test/toml/1.json 测试用例在 one-dark-pro 风格下的渲染结果
make t=toml i=1 s=one-dark-pro
```

[now carbon](https://carbon.now.sh/) [ruslanspivak lsbasi-part1](https://ruslanspivak.com/lsbasi-part1/)

https://ruslanspivak.com/lsbasi-part1/ 

https://ruslanspivak.com/lsbasi-part1/

## 参考

- [Let's Build A Simple Interpreter](https://ruslanspivak.com/lsbasi-part1/)
- [tree-sitter](https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter)
- [pygments](https://pygments.org/)
- [carbon](https://carbon.now.sh/)

functions.name: syntaxlight.language.guess_language
documentation: 通过文件名猜测文法类型

functions.name: syntaxlight.language.is_language_support
documentation: 检验 syntaxlight 是否支持当前语言

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.dot_parser.DotParser.compass_pt
documentation: <compass_pt> ::= (n | ne | e | se | s | sw | w | nw | c | _)

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.lua_parser.LuaParser.stat
documentation:
<stat> ::= ';'
         | <varlist> '=' <explist>
         | <functioncall>
         | <label>
         | break
         | goto <ID>
         | do <block> end
         | while <exp> do <block> end
         | repeat <block> until <exp>
         | if <exp> then <block> (elseif <exp> then <block>)* (else <block>)? end
         | for <ID> '=' <exp> ',' <exp> (',' <exp>)? do <block> end
         | for <namelist> in <explist> do <block> end
         | function <funcname> <funcbody>
         | local function <ID> <funcbody>
         | local <attnamelist> ('=' <explist>)?

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.lua_parser.LuaParser.var
documentation:
<var> ::= <ID>
        | <prefixexp> '[' <exp> ']'
        | <prefixexp> '.' <ID>

<var> 与下面的 prefixexp functioncall 形成了循环推导

<prefixexp> ::= <var>
              | <functioncall>
              | '(' <exp> ')'

<functioncall> ::= <prefixexp> (':' <ID>)? <args>

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.lua_parser.LuaParser._match_functiondef
documentation: 匹配 varlist 和 explist 的函数定义

classes.name: syntaxlight.parsers.toml_parser.TomlParser
documentation: TOML do not skip invisible character `\r\n`

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.error
documentation:
仿 rust 错误输出格式

  --> src/main.rs:33:9
   |
33 |     let result = loop {
   |         ^^^^^^ help: if this is intentional, prefix it with an underscore: `_result`
   |
   = note: `#[warn(unused_variables)]` on by default

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.warning
documentation: 语法解析过程中的警告信息

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.eat
documentation:
匹配一个 token_type 类型的 token, 并获取下一个 token 更新 current_token

token_type 默认值为 None, 表示匹配当前 current_token.type

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.manual_get_next_token
documentation: 正常情况下调用 eat 获取下一个 token, 如果需要合并多个 token 并生成一个新的 token 时可调用此函数

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.manual_register_token
documentation:
正常情况下不需要手动将 token 注册到 _token_list 当中, eat 内部会调用此方法

如果因为合并或分割创建了新的 token 可调用此方法注册

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.after_eat
documentation: 如果希望在 eat 之后对于 current_token 进行一些操作, 比如查 GDT 或处理预处理关键字, 可在继承类中重载此方法

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser._skip
documentation:
跳过不可见字符和空格

由 self.skip_invis_chars 与 self.skip_space 控制

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.skip_crlf
documentation:
set `skip_invis_chars` to False 

跳过连续的换行 `\n` or `\r\n`

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.eat_lf
documentation: 跳过一个换行, 如果是结尾 EOF 则不跳过

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.peek_next_token
documentation: 查看下一个 token 的类型

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser._register_token
documentation:
将一个 token 注册到 token_list 当中

每一个 token 都需要间接的执行此过程, 以便最终恢复高亮文本信息

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.to_html
documentation: 将一个解析完成的 AST node 输出其 token 流的 HTML 格式

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.brace_matching
documentation: 对于 ([{<>}]) 计算括号深度

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.get_keyword
syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.get_punctuator
documentation:
获取运算符

对于 <> 修正为 TokenType.LT 和 TokenType.GT

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.get_number
documentation:
@ pattern: 匹配数字的正则, 两个 group 用于匹配数字部分和类型部分

比如对于 rust 的数字来说: pattern = r'(.*?)([iu](?:32|64|128|size))$'

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.list_items
syntaxlight.parsers.parser.Parser.string_inside_format
documentation:
取出其中格式化字符(如 %d %x 
) 并新建 token

documentation: bash 的文法可变因素太多, 这里直接不使用 BNF 采取匹配的方式

documentation:
*Copyright (c) 2023 All rights reserved
*@description: enbf/c17_enhance.bnf 在 C17 文法上扩展

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser.external_declaration
documentation:
<external-declaration> ::= <function-definition>
                         | <declaration>
                         | <group>
                         | <statement>

在这里没有办法区分, 需要查看 <declarator> 后面是否有<declaration>* 和 <compound-statement> 才可以确定是 <function-definition>

@EXTEND-GRAMMAR
添加 <group> <statement> 以适配宏定义与开头的陈述语句. C 默认不支持 if for 作为陈述语句, 这里添加对于代码段的扩展支持

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser.type_specifier
documentation:
<type-specifier> ::= void
                   | char
                   | short
                   | int
                   | long
                   | float
                   | double
                   | signed
                   | unsigned
                   | _Bool
                   | _Complex
                   | <atomic-type-specifier>
                   | <struct-or-union-specifier>
                   | <enum-specifier>
                   | <typedef-name>

                   | bool
@EXTEND-GRAMMAR
bool 为 C23 中引入, 但实在是太常见了, 一般都会 typedef int bool

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser.parameter_list
documentation:
<parameter-list> ::= <parameter-declaration> ("," <parameter-declaration>)* ("," "...")?

@EXTEND-GRAMMAR
考虑未定义过的参数类型: void updatePersonInfo(Person*, int, char*, Student*);
对于 TokenType.ID 修改为CTokenType.TYPEDEF_ID

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser._binary_expression
documentation:
方便后面优先级运算符调用

为了避免大量的AST嵌套, 简化过程, 如果没有 expr_rights 则直接返回 expr_left

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser.primary_expression
documentation:
<primary-expression> ::= <identifier>
                       | <constant>
                       | <string>
                       | <char>
                       | "(" <expression> ")"
                       | <generic-selection>

# @EXTEND-GRAMMAR: braced-group in expression
# see more in https://github.com/luzhixing12345/syntaxlight/issues/13

<primary-expression>   | "(" <compound-statement> ")"

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser._match_macro_function
documentation:
匹配不符合 C 文法的宏定义函数

1. 对于全大写 ID 的会被认为是宏函数

   XBOX_ARG_BOOLEAN(NULL, [-h][--help][help = "show help information"])

2. 对于前面定义过的宏函数会被匹配

   #define container_of()

   struct ipc_namespace *ns = container_of(table->data, struct ipc_namespace, shm_rmid_forced);

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser.declaration
documentation:
<declaration> ::= <declaration-specifier>+ (<init-declarator-list>)? ";"
                | <static-assert-declaration>
                | extern "C" <compound-statement>

也有可能是 <function-definition>, 如果 <init-declarator-list> 的只有一个元素且没有 <initializer> 且后面跟着的是 <declaration>* <compound-statement>

<function-definition> ::= <declaration-specifier>* <declarator>  <GNU-attribute>? <declaration>* <compound-statement>

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser.if_section
documentation:
<if-section> ::= <if-group>
               | <elif-group>
               | <else-group>
               | <endif-line>

@EXTEND-GRAMMAR
考虑到宏与定义穿插, 这里直接将原始的文法(如下)打散

<if-section> ::= <if-group> <elif-group>* <else-group>? <endif-line>

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser.control_line
documentation:
<control-line> ::= "#" include <header-name> <CRLF>
                 | "#" define <identfier> <pp-token>* <CRLF>
                 | "#" define <identifier> "(" <identifier-list>? ")" <pp-token>* <CRLF>
                 | "#" define <identifier> "(" "..." ")" <pp-token>* <CRLF>
                 | "#" define <identifier> "(" <identifier-list> "," "..." ")" <pp-token>* <CRLF>
                 | "#" undef <identifier> <CRLF>
                 | "#" line <pp-token>+ <CRLF>
                 | "#" error <pp-token>* <CRLF>
                 | "#" pragma <pp-token>* <CRLF>
                 | "#" <CRLF>

<pp-token> ::= any

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser.header_name
documentation:
< h-char-sequence >

any member of the source character set except the new-line character and >

<string>

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.c_parser.CParser._unknown_typedef_id_guess
syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.meta_item
documentation:
meta_item ::= ident '=' lit
            | ident '(' <<comma_separated_list meta_item>> ')'
            | ident

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.stmt_item
documentation:
stmt_item ::= static_item
            | const_item
            | type_item
            | block_item
            | use_item
            | let_item

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.block_item
documentation:
block_item ::= (outer_attrs | inner_attr)?
             (fn_item
             | mod_item
             | struct_item
             | enum_item
             | impl_item
             | trait_item
             | foreign_mod_item
             )

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser._register_fn_param
documentation: 将参数中的 mut 注册到 GDT 中

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser._unregister_fn_param
documentation: 离开作用域时, 从 GDT 中删除参数中的 mut

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.impl_item
documentation:
impl_item ::= [unsafe] impl [generic_params] ty_sum [for ty_sum] [where_clause]
      '{' inner_attr* ([visibility] impl_member)* '}'

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.impl_member
documentation:
impl_member ::= type ident '=' ty_sum ';'
              | const ident ':' ty_sum '=' expr ';'
              | member_fn_item

member_fn_item ::= fn ident [generic_params] member_fn_params [ret_ty] [where_clause] block_expr

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.trait_member
documentation:
trait_member ::= type ty_param ';'
               | fn ident [generic_params] member_fn_params [ret_ty] [where_clause] (';' | block_expr )

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.pat
documentation:
pat ::= '_'
      | '&' pat
      | mut ident
      | ref [mut] ident
      | '(' <<comma_separated_list pat>> ')'
      | '[' <<comma_separated_list pat>> ']'
      | path '(' <<comma_separated_list pat>> ')'
      | path '{' <<comma_separated_list pat_field>> ['..']'}'
      | path ['@' lit]
      | '-'? lit

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.ty
documentation:
ty ::= '(' ty_sum ')'
     | '()'
     | '(' <<comma_separated_list ty>> ')'
     | '*' ptr
     | '[' ty_sum ']'
     | '[' ty_sum ';' expr ']'
     | '&' [lifetime] [mut] ty
     | bare_fn
     | type_path

bare_fn 是什么?
ptr 是什么?

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.expr
documentation:
expr ::= assign_expr
       | range_expr
       | lor_expr
       | land_expr
       | comp_group
       | bor_expr
       | bxor_expr
       | band_expr
       | shift_group
       | add_group
       | mul_group
       | cast_expr

       --- expr op expr ---

       | unary_group
       | macro_expr
       | primary_group

       --- expr match ---

       | ref_group -- expr suffix

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.unary_group
documentation:
unary_group ::= box_expr
              | unary_min_expr
              | deref_expr
              | not_expr
              | borrow_expr

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.ref_group
documentation:
ref_group ::= ref_expr | array_ref_expr | call_expr

ref_expr ::= expr '.' (ident | lit_integer)
array_ref_expr ::= expr '[' index_expr ']'
private index_expr ::= expr || ..
call_expr ::= expr ["::" generic_values] '(' [<<comma_separated_list expr>>] ')'

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.primary_group
documentation:
primary_group ::= struct_expr
                | simple_ref_expr
                | literal_expr
                | paren_expr
                | tuple_expr
                | array_expr
                | lambda_expr
                | return_expr
                | statement_like_expr
                | continue
                | break [expr|lifetime ";"?]

struct_expr ::= expr_path '{' <<comma_separated_list struct_field>> ['..' expr]'}'

simple_ref_expr ::= expr_path | self
literal_expr ::= lit
paren_expr ::= &('(' expr ')') '(' expr ')'
tuple_expr ::= '(' expr ',' [<<comma_separated_list expr>>] ')'
array_expr ::= '[' expr ';' expr ']'
             | '[' [<<comma_separated_list expr>>] ']'
return_expr ::= return [expr]

@EXTENDED-GRAMMAR: 添加 continue 和 break 的语法

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.statement_like_expr
documentation:
statement_like_expr ::= block_expr
                      | unsafe_block_expr
                      | if_expr
                      | while_expr
                      | loop_expr
                      | match_expr
                      | for_expr

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.if_expr
documentation: if_expr ::= if (let pat '=' expr | expr) block_expr [else (if_expr | block_expr)]

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.while_expr
documentation: while_expr ::= while (let pat '=' expr | expr) block_expr

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.match_expr
documentation:
match_expr ::= match expr '{'
    (pats [if expr] '=>' (block_expr [',']| expr ','))*
    [pats [if expr] '=>' expr]
'}'

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.for_expr
documentation: for_expr ::= for pat in expr block_expr

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.stmt
documentation:
stmt ::= stmt_item
       | let_item
       | label_item
       | statement_like_expr
       | expr "?"? ';'?
       | ';'

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.rust_parser.RustParser.lit
documentation:
lit ::= (lit_byte
      | lit_char
      | lit_integer
      | lit_float
      | lit_string
      | lit_byte_string
      | '()'
      | true
      | false
      | str
      | ..)

      ["..=" lit]

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.table_entries
documentation:
<table_entries> ::= <combinational_entry>+
                  | <sequential_entry>+

<combinational_entry> ::= <level_input_list> : <OUTPUT_SYMBOL> ;
<sequential_entry> ::= <input_list> : <state> : <next_state> ;

<input_list> ::= <level_input_list>
               | <edge_input_list>

<level_input_list> ::= <LEVEL_SYMBOL>+

<edge_input_list> ::= <LEVEL_SYMBOL>* <edge> <LEVEL_SYMBOL>*

<edge> ::= ( <LEVEL_SYMBOL> <LEVEL_SYMBOL> )
         | <EDGE_SYMBOL>

<state> ::= <LEVEL_SYMBOL>

<next_state> ::= <OUTPUT_SYMBOL>
               | - (This is a literal hyphen, see Chapter 5 for details).

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.get_number
documentation: 对于 4'h111 的类型做分割

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.statement
documentation:
<statement> ::= <blocking_assignment> ;
            ||= <non_blocking_assignment> ;
            ||= if ( <expression> ) <statement_or_null>
            ||= if ( <expression> ) <statement_or_null> else <statement_or_null>
            ||= case ( <expression> ) <case_item>+ endcase
            ||= casez ( <expression> ) <case_item>+ endcase
            ||= casex ( <expression> ) <case_item>+ endcase
            ||= forever <statement>
            ||= repeat ( <expression> ) <statement>
            ||= while ( <expression> ) <statement>
            ||= for ( <assignment> ; <expression> ; <assignment> ) <statement>
            ||= <delay_or_event_control> <statement_or_null>
            ||= wait ( <expression> ) <statement_or_null>
            ||= -> <name_of_event> ;
            ||= <seq_block>
            ||= <par_block>
            ||= <task_enable>
            ||= <system_task_enable>
            ||= disable <name_of_task> ;
            ||= disable <name_of_block> ;
            ||= assign <assignment> ;
            ||= deassign <lvalue> ;
            ||= force <assignment> ;
            ||= release <lvalue> ;
            ||= <genvar_declaration>

@EXTEND-GRAMMAR: 不好区分阻塞和非阻塞, 所以合并二者
@EXTEND-GRAMMAR: 添加 genvar

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.system_task_enable
documentation:
<system_task_enable>
                    ::= <name_of_system_task> ;
                    ||= <name_of_system_task> ( <expression> <,<expression>>* ) ;
<name_of_system_task> ::= $<system_identifier> (Note: the $ may not be followed by a space.)

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.module_port_connection
documentation:
<module_port_connection>
    ::= <expression>
    ||= <NULL>

<NULL>
    ::= nothing - this form covers the case of an empty item in a list - for example:
        (a, b, , d)

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.blocking_assignment
documentation:
<blocking_assignment>
                    ::= <lvalue> (=|<=) <expression>
                    ||= <lvalue> = <delay_or_event_control> <expression> ;

@EXTEND-GRAMMAR: 不好区分阻塞和非阻塞, 所以合并二者

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.path_description
documentation:
@EXTEND-GRAMMAR: <polarity_operator>?
补充 edge_sensitive_path_declaration 的情况

<path_description>
    ::= ( <specify_input_terminal_descriptor> <polarity_operator>? => <specify_output_terminal_descriptor> )
    ||= ( <list_of_path_inputs> <polarity_operator>? *> <list_of_path_outputs> )

<specify_input_terminal_descriptor>
    ::= <input_identifier>
    ||= <input_identifier> [ <constant_expression> ]
    ||= <input_identifier> [ <constant_expression> : <constant_expression> ]

<specify_output_terminal_descriptor>
    ::= <output_identifier>
    ||= <output_identifier> [ <constant_expression> ]
    ||= <output_identifier> [ <constant_expression> : <constant_expression> ]

<input_identifier>
    ::= the <IDENTIFIER> of a module input or inout terminal

<output_identifier>
    ::= the <IDENTIFIER> of a module output or inout terminal.

<polarity_operator>
    ::= +
    ||= -

<edge_identifier>
    ::= posedge
    ||= negedge

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.function_call
documentation:
<function_call>
    ::= <name_of_function> ( <expression> <,<expression>>* )
    ||= <name_of_system_function> ( <expression> <,<expression>>* )
    ||= <name_of_system_function>

<name_of_function>
    ::= <identifier>

<name_of_system_function>
    ::= $<SYSTEM_IDENTIFIER>
    (Note: the $ may not be followed by a space.)

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.edge_sensitive_path_declaration
documentation:
<edge_sensitive_path_declaration>
    ::= <if (<expression>)>? (<edge_identifier>?
        <specify_input_terminal_descriptor> =>
        (<specify_output_terminal_descriptor> <polarity_operator>?
        : <data_source_expression>)) = <path_delay_value>;
    ||= <if (<expression>)>? (<edge_identifier>?
        <specify_input_terminal_descriptor> "*>"
        (<list_of_path_outputs> <polarity_operator>?
        : <data_source_expression>)) =<path_delay_value>;

<data_source_expression>
    Any expression, including constants and lists. Its width must be one bit or
    equal to the  destination's width. If the destination is a list, the data
    source must be as wide as the sum of  the bits of the members.

<edge_identifier>
    ::= posedge
    ||= negedge

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.unary_operator
documentation:
<UNARY_OPERATOR> is one of the following tokens:
        +  -  !  ~  &  ~&  |  ^|  ^  ~^

methods.name: syntaxlight.parsers.verilog_parser.VerilogParser.binary_operator
documentation:
<BINARY_OPERATOR> is one of the following tokens:
            +  -  *  /  %  ==  !=  ===  !==  &&  ||  <  <=  >  >=  &  |  ^  ^~  >>  <<

methods.name: syntaxlight.asts.rust_ast.PathGlob.register_gdt
documentation: 将最后一个导入的路径注册到 GDT 中

functions.name: syntaxlight.syntax_parse.parse
documentation:
解析文本, 高亮代码段

return: (html, error)
html: html 格式的代码段, 无论是否有错误, 都会返回; 错误位置会用红色标记, 其后面的代码段会被默认高亮
error: 异常信息, 无错误时为 None, 有错误时为异常对象(Error), 可以打印错误信息
highlight_lines: 要高亮的代码段的行号

functions.name: syntaxlight.syntax_parse.get_lexer
documentation:
@code_or_path: 代码或者文件的路径
@lanaguge: 选择的语言, 如果第一个参数为文件路径则不需要传入 language

functions.name: syntaxlight.asts.ast.add_ast_type
documentation: 为叶节点补充添加类名信息

functions.name: syntaxlight.asts.ast.delete_ast_type
documentation: 为叶节点补充去除类名信息

methods.name: syntaxlight.asts.ast.AST.register_token
documentation: 将 token 注册到 AST 树中以更新 token 的属性

methods.name: syntaxlight.asts.ast.AST.update
documentation: 对于一些后续才可以获取的属性, 或者子 AST 节点的注册, 调用此方法更新子 AST 对象内部的元素

methods.name: syntaxlight.asts.ast.AST._update_sub_ast
documentation: 为叶节点补充添加类名信息, 但 token 会有很复杂的 class name, 不宜采用

methods.name: syntaxlight.asts.ast.AST.visit
documentation: 由 node visitor 访问时递归调用

classes.name: syntaxlight.asts.ast.NodeVisitor

methods.name: syntaxlight.asts.ast.NodeVisitor.link
documentation:
usage inside AST : node_visitor.link(self, self.xxx)

内部做了各种判断, 只需考虑访问顺序
遍历 AST 节点构建 graphviz 图结构

functions.name: syntaxlight.error.ttyinfo
documentation: tty 彩色输出, 默认红色

methods.name: syntaxlight.error.Error.error_format
documentation:
仿 rust 错误输出格式

  --> src/main.rs:33:9
   |
33 |     let result = loop {
   |         ^^^^^^ help: if this is intentional, prefix it with an underscore: `_result`
   |
   = note: `#[warn(unused_variables)]` on by default

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.diff_lexer.DiffLexer.get_next_token
documentation: diff 很特别,只需要按行分割, 判断开头 +-@ 即可

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lua_lexer.LuaLexer.get_literal_str
documentation:
[[ ... ]]
[====[ ]====]
数量相等的匹配长换行字符串

保留内部所有字符串的原始值, 包括转义字符 \

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.lexers.verilog_lexer.VerilogTokenType.EDGE_SYMBOL
documentation: r   R   f   F   p   P   n   N   *

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.verilog_lexer.VerilogLexer.get_number
documentation:
<NUMBER>
    Numbers can be specified in decimal, hexadecimal, octal or binary, and may
    optionally start with a + or -.  The <BASE> token controls what number digits
    are legal.  <BASE> must be one of d, h, o, or b, for the bases decimal,
    hexadecimal, octal, and binary respectively. A number can contain any set of
    the following characters that is consistent with <BASE>:
    0123456789abcdefABCDEFxXzZ?

<BASE> is one of the following tokens:
    'b   'B   'o   'O   'd   'D   'h   'H

documentation: 自定义类型 / 未知类型

注册函数

返回值如果存在多个可能的类型, 保存在 Tuple 后传入

methods.name: syntaxlight.gdt.GlobalDescriptorTable.delete_scope

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.token.TokenType.LANGLE_BRACE
documentation: 左尖括号, 如果想表达小于应转换为 LT

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.token.TokenType.RANGLE_BRACE
documentation: 右尖括号, 如果想表达大于应转换为 GT

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.token.TokenType.STRING
documentation: STRING 表示严格意义上的字符串, 即 "" 两个双引号包裹的

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.token.TokenType.CHARACTER
documentation: CHARACTER 表示单个字符, 即 'a'

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.token.TokenType.STR
documentation: STR 表示 "" | '' 包裹的字符串

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.token.TokenType.NUMBER
documentation: 整数 | 小数 | 科学计数法

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.token.TokenType.LT
documentation: 小于, 由 LANGLE_BRACE 转换而来

class_variables.name: syntaxlight.token.TokenType.GT
documentation: 大于, 由 RANGLE_BRACE 转换而来

documentation:
ID 指创建的索引值
column 指该 token 最后一个字符的位置

documentation: 用于 first set 的构建

classes.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.build_long_op_dict
documentation: 构造长运算符的匹配模式

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer._record
documentation:
用于 parser 中 peek_next_token

记录当前 lexer 解析状态, 被 _reset 调用时恢复

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer._reset
documentation:
用于 parser 中 peek_next_token

恢复为 lexer 之前的状态

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.advance
documentation: 获取下一个字符, 遇到换行则更新 line

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.skip_whitespace
documentation: 通常来说直接跳过空格即可, 这里保留空格是为了不破坏原本的代码格式

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.peek
documentation:
向后看 n 个字符

当 n > 1 时,返回 n 个字符的切片

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.get_number
documentation:
<digit> ::= [0-9]
<digits> ::= <digit>*
<number> ::= <digits>(.<digits>)?(E|e[+-]?<digits>)?

@accept_float: 允许小数和科学计数法
@accept_hex  : 允许16进制表示 0xfff
@accept_bit  : 允许二进制表示 0b111

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.get_str
documentation: 匹配 "" 和 '' 之间的字符

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.get_id
documentation:
获取标识符, 留给后续的语法分析处理
@ignore_case : 是否忽略大小写
@extend_chars: 扩展字符, 默认扩展 "_", 一般还可修改为 ["_", "-"]

<letter> ::= [A-Za-z]
 <digit> ::= [0-9]
    <id> ::= (<letter>|_)(<letter>|_|<digit>)*

此函数应次于 get_number 调用

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.get_comment
documentation:
跳过注释部分, 多个注释的情况需要分多个 get_comment 函数处理

        单行注释不包含结尾的 


        python 风格: ("#", "
")
             C 风格: ("//", "
"), ("/*", "*/")
        pascal 风格: ("//", "
"), ("{", "}"), ("(*", "*)")

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.get_long_op
documentation:
匹配一个长运算符

需要使用 build_long_op_dict 函数设置所有支持的长运算符

默认的一些常用长运算符见 TokenType, 也可以自定义新的长运算符

methods.name: syntaxlight.lexers.lexer.Lexer.get_next_token

documentation:
Lexer 基类, 提供了一些基础函数和功能, 比如匹配数字, 匹配字符串

    可能有些编程语言的处理(比如Lua的字符串)不同, 单独覆盖即可

继承 Lexer 的子类需要重写其 get_next_token 方法以提供给后续的 parser 解析
